event.name: Infiltrate Finale Galleria
event.description: Narrative gravity pulls every ally, rival, credential, and unpaid invoice into one mall.

text.content: Finale Galleria has closed for the apocalypse but the food court remains open. Tess enters beneath a skyline beam while abandoned versions of familiar heroes watch from darkened storefronts.
They filmed six endings. Let us make the seventh thing they fear: an unscheduled decision.
